transcript: Speaker A (Robot): ನನ್ನ ಕಡೆ ನೋಡು. [Look at me.] Speaker B (Woman): Look at me. Speaker A (Robot): ನಿಧಾನವಾಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡು. [Speak slowly.] Speaker B (Woman): Speak slowly. Speaker A (Robot): ಬಾಗಿಲು ಮುಚ್ಚು. [Close the door.] Speaker B (Woman): Close the door. Speaker A (Robot): ನಾನು ಬರುತ್ತಿದ್ದೇನೆ. [I am coming.] Speaker B (Woman): I am coming. Speaker A (Robot): ಅದನ್ನು ಮತ್ತೆ ಹೇಳು. [Say that again.] Speaker B (Woman): Say that again. Speaker A (Robot): MySivi app ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ practice ಮಾಡಿ. ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡುತ್ತಾ easy ಆಗಿ English ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ. Daily just 10-15 min ಸಾಕು. ನೀವು ಕೂಡ confident ಆಗಿ English ಮಾತನಾಡಬಹುದು. Speaking, grammar, sentence building ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ಒಂದೇ place ನಲ್ಲಿ, just for 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ. MySivi download ಮಾಡಿ, ಇಂದೇ start ಮಾಡಿ. [Practice with me like this on MySivi app. Speak in Kannada and learn English easily. Just 10-15 mins daily is enough. You too can speak English confidently. Speaking, grammar, sentence building all in one place, just for 1 rupee. Download MySivi, start today.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: "ನನ್ನ ಕಡೆ ನೋಡು." / "LOOK AT ME." "ನಿಧಾನವಾಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡು." / "SPEAK SLOWLY." "ಬಾಗಿಲು ಮುಚ್ಚು." / "CLOSE THE DOOR." "ನಾನು ಬರುತ್ತಿದ್ದೇನೆ." / "I AM COMING." "ಅದನ್ನು ಮತ್ತೆ ಹೇಳು." / "SAY THAT AGAIN." MySivi APP ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ PRACTICE ಮಾಡಿ. [Practice like this with me on the app.] ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡುತ್ತಾ EASY ಆಗಿ ENGLISH ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ. [Learn English easily while speaking in Kannada.] DAILY JUST 10-15 MIN ಸಾಕು [Just 10-15 mins daily is enough] ನೀವು ಕೂಡ CONFIDENT ಆಗಿ ENGLISH ಮಾತನಾಡಬಹುದು. [You too can speak English confidently.] SPEAKING, GRAMMAR, SENTENCE BUILDING ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ಒಂದೇ PLACE ನಲ್ಲಿ [Speaking, grammar, sentence building all in one place] JUST FOR ₹1 DOWNLOAD ಮಾಡಿ, ಇಂದೇ START ಮಾಡಿ. [Download and start today.] MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: An AI robot guides a Kannada speaker through English translation exercises, demonstrating how the MySivi app helps users practice English daily. The ad highlights features like grammar and sentence building for just 1 rupee, encouraging viewers to download the app.
